div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China (Stuart)
div.p: A–129. Connection consultation air transport agreement, suggest Emb attempt elimination or, if that is impossible, modification of art 3 agreement. Present wording appears to be in error in that it is multilateral language derived from Chicago standard form.See Department of State Conference Series No. 64: International Civil Aviation Conference, Chicago, Illinois, November 1 to December 7, 1944, Final Act and Related Documents. Suggest Emb review files concerning negotiations, particularly Deptel 732 Sep 9, 1946.Foreign Relations, 1946, vol. x, p. 1239.
Copy this airgram being sent Shanghai.
